summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; unrelated non-security PRs are kept, marked related, or flagged for exact maintainer review.

actions.reason: Distinct non-security PR with missing behavior proof; keep as its own review item.
Maintainer judgment is needed to choose the canonical heartbeat reasoning fix path before any close or merge recommendation.
Security-boundary-labeled Voice Call objective work is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup automation.
Useful non-security PR with active maintainer review; not a duplicate or inventory close target.
Related to other tool-result truncation work but distinct in root cause and scope; keep open rather than closing in this shard.
Non-security PR is blocked on proof/checks but is not a duplicate, superseded, or low-signal close target under this job.
Approval verification changes cross a security boundary and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Exec approval UI and authorization-path work is security-boundary-sensitive and out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup automation.
Ready-looking non-security PR still requires maintainer technical review; merge is blocked by job policy and missing merge preflight.
Draft maintainer tracker/generator PR has review blockers and dirty merge state; keep as an independent maintainer-owned item rather than closing in inventory cleanup.

needs_human: #92356 needs maintainer selection of the canonical heartbeat reasoning fix path because hydrated #92263 overlaps and no canonical was designated.
#79397 needs maintainer technical review before any merge path; proof and automated review look clean, but merge is blocked in this job and no merge preflight is present.
